title: Production spec graph
description: Generated from production Populace and Ledger source contracts; nodes and attributes are extracted from code, not maintained in the page.

nodes.title: Cell Guard Spec
nodes.summary: A guard cell that must match before a selector resolves.

nodes.title: Cell Selector Spec
nodes.summary: A checked selector for one parsed source cell.

nodes.title: Declarative Record Set
nodes.summary: One YAML record-set payload that compiles to source-record specs.

nodes.title: Range Label Guard Spec
nodes.summary: A guard that validates labels across every row in a selected range.

nodes.title: S O U R C E  A R T I F A C T  C A C H E  E N V
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger source packages.

nodes.title: S O U R C E  P A C K A G E  A L I A S E S
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger source packages.

nodes.title: Source Artifact Spec
nodes.summary: Declarative source artifact lookup and provenance metadata.

nodes.title: Source Package Scaffold Report
nodes.summary: Report for a scaffolded source package.

nodes.title: Source Package Validation Report
nodes.summary: Validation report for one declarative source package.

nodes.title: Source Record
nodes.summary: Resolved source record with cell-level lineage.

nodes.title: Source Record Set Measure
nodes.summary: One logical measure/column in a compact source-record set spec.

nodes.title: Source Record Set Range Label Guard
nodes.summary: A row-range guard for compact source-record specs.

nodes.title: Source Record Set Row
nodes.summary: One logical row in a compact source-record set spec.

nodes.title: Source Record Set Row Guard
nodes.summary: A row-relative guard cell for compact source-record specs.

nodes.title: Source Record Set Spec
nodes.summary: Compact authoring spec that expands into atomic source-record specs.

nodes.title: Source Record Spec
nodes.summary: Simulator-neutral source record interpretation for a selected cell.

nodes.title: Source Region Spec
nodes.summary: One logical source region selected from a parsed artifact.

nodes.title: A L L O W E D  A G G R E G A T I O N S
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger fact schema.

nodes.title: A L L O W E D  C O N C E P T  R E L A T I O N S
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger fact schema.

nodes.title: A L L O W E D  C O N S T R A I N T  O P E R A T O R S
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger fact schema.

nodes.title: A L L O W E D  E N T I T I E S
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger fact schema.

nodes.title: A L L O W E D  G E O G R A P H Y  L E V E L S
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger fact schema.

nodes.title: A L L O W E D  P E R I O D  T Y P E S
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger fact schema.

nodes.title: Aggregate Constraint
nodes.summary: One semantic filter that scopes an aggregate fact.

nodes.title: Aggregation
nodes.summary: How source observations are aggregated into the fact value.

nodes.title: F A C T  K E Y  P R E F I X
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger fact schema.

nodes.title: Source Provenance
nodes.summary: Source identity and extraction provenance for a fact.

nodes.title: Source Record Layout
nodes.summary: Non-semantic layout metadata for rebuilding source tables.

nodes.title: Validation Report
nodes.summary: Validation and QA summary for a fact set.

nodes.title: C O N S U M E R  F A C T  S C H E M A  V E R S I O N
nodes.summary: Production constant from Ledger consumer contracts.

nodes.title: Consumer Fact Export Report
nodes.summary: Counts from exporting Arch facts to consumer-contract JSONL.

nodes.title: Entity Schema
nodes.summary: Entity structure of a frame: one person entity plus group entities.

nodes.title: Link Spec
nodes.summary: Declaration of an association (link) between two entities.

nodes.title: Mass Change
nodes.summary: A declared, intentional change to a weight vector's total mass.

nodes.title: Mass Change Record
nodes.summary: An entry in a frame's mass log: one applied, intentional mass change.

nodes.title: Variable Metadata
nodes.summary: What a variable is: owning entity, dtype kind, and period semantics.

nodes.title: Weights
nodes.summary: An immutable, validated weight vector for one entity.

nodes.title: Donor Spec
nodes.summary: The donor survey an imputation stage draws from.

nodes.title: Stage Plan
nodes.summary: An ordered, validated sequence of :class:`Stage` steps.

nodes.title: Stage Record
nodes.summary: Evidence one stage ran: what it produced and how populated it is.

nodes.title: F O R M A T  K E Y
nodes.summary: Production constant from Populace target registry.

nodes.title: F O R M A T  V E R S I O N
nodes.summary: Production constant from Populace target registry.

nodes.title: Relative error loss
nodes.summary: THE loss, in numpy: capped weighted MAPE on fixed row scales.

nodes.title: Target
nodes.summary: One calibration fact: a known aggregate the weights should reproduce.

nodes.title: Target Registry
nodes.summary: An ordered, content-addressed collection of :class:`TargetSpec` facts.

nodes.title: Target Set
nodes.summary: An ordered, immutable collection of :class:`Target` facts.

nodes.title: Target Spec
nodes.summary: One declared calibration fact: value, uncertainty, and citation.

nodes.title: Aggregate admin gate
nodes.summary: Weighted aggregates against administrative anchors, signs checked.

nodes.title: Dataset Spec
nodes.summary: A pointer to one published populace population and how to read it.

nodes.title: Exported nonzero gate
nodes.summary: Every exported column carries signal: no all-zero stored layers.

nodes.title: Formula owned export gate
nodes.summary: Formula-owned engine outputs must not be persisted as inputs.

nodes.title: Gate Report
nodes.summary: The full acceptance suite: every gate, one verdict.

nodes.title: Parity gate
nodes.summary: Every layer the reference populates, the candidate populates.

nodes.title: Per family fit gate
nodes.summary: Calibration fit per source family: no family hides in the average.

nodes.title: Support gate
nodes.summary: Every imputed value lies inside its donor's realized range.

nodes.title: Target Coverage Requirement
nodes.summary: One required concept in a calibration target profile.
